creator: tom@khubla.com
text: I've seen the same problem on two freebsd 4.2 boxes.  In both cases mpd-netgraph was installed on a clean box.  Bringing up mpd-netgraph was fine, but as soon at a PPTP connection from a Windows98 box was established the box would crash, wait for user input for 15 seconds and then reboot.  Both boxes I used has two network interfaces and were using ipfilter and natd.
